entities.name: INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies used to handle information and aid communication, enabling online and web-based courses

entities.name: OPEN DISTANCE LEARNING
entities.description: Educational methodologies that allow students to learn remotely, categorized into synchronous and asynchronous modes

entities.name: SYNCHRONOUS LEARNING
entities.description: Real-time online learning methodologies including Chat, Flash meetings, Breeze meeting, Teleconferencing, and Video Conferencing

entities.name: ASYNCHRONOUS LEARNING
entities.description: Self-paced online learning methodologies including Internet education portals, web based learning management systems, Forums, and wikis

entities.name: RURAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Populations living in remote, non-urban areas who often lack access to educational technologies

entities.name: M S SWAMINATHAN RESEARCH FOUNDATION
entities.description: An organization focused on pro-nature, pro-poor, and pro-women technology development and dissemination

entities.name: CHENNAI
entities.description: The city in India where the M S Swaminathan Research Foundation began functioning in 1989

entities.name: INFORMATION VILLAGE RESEARCH PROJECT
entities.description: A project initiated in 1992 to disseminate technology to rural areas through resource and knowledge centres

entities.name: VILLAGE RESOURCE CENTRES
entities.description: Centres established as part of the Information Village Research Project to provide resources to rural areas

entities.name: VILLAGE KNOWLEDGE CENTRES
entities.description: Centres established as part of the Information Village Research Project to provide knowledge to rural areas

entities.name: JAMSETJI TATA NATIONAL VIRTUAL ACADEMY
entities.description: An academy established in 2003 to empower vulnerable remote rural Indian communities through ODL

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the virtual academy and rural community empowerment projects are located

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Economic and developmental possibilities created through skill and capacity building in rural communities
